name: Fresh Blueberry Cake (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat butter into flour and sugar until well combined.
4. Set aside 3/4 cup of the mixture.
5. To the remaining mixture in the bowl, add eggs, milk, baking powder, and vanilla. Beat thoroughly until batter is smooth and not grainy.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan, spreading it up around the sides to completely line the pan and create a hollow in the center.
7. Place blueberries in the hollow.
8. Add 1 tablespoon butter and cinnamon to the reserved 3/4 cup flour mixture; work with fingers until crumbly.
9. Sprinkle crumbs on top of berries.
10. Bake for 5 minutes at 450°F, then reduce heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
11. Serve warm or cold.
